
## セットアップ

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(tools)
library(Momocs)
source("scripts/functions.R")
palette("Okabe-Ito")
```

## 輪郭データの読み込み

```{r}
#| label: load_contours

file_paths_xy <- list.files(
  "data/contour_triadica_sebifera//",
  full.names = TRUE,
  pattern = "\\.csv$"
)
id_name <- file_path_sans_ext(basename(file_paths_xy))

xy_list <- lapply(file_paths_xy, function(fp) {
  cat("File:", fp, "\n")
  df <- read.csv(fp)
  df <- df[, c("x", "y")]
  df <- as.matrix(df)
  storage.mode(df) <- "double"
  # 輪郭が閉じていない場合、最初の点を最後に追加して閉じる
  if (!all(df[1, ] == df[nrow(df), ])) {
    df <- rbind(df, df[1, ])
  }
  return(df)
})
names(xy_list) <- id_name

out <- Out(xy_list) # MomocsのOutオブジェクトに変換
names(out) <- id_name
```

## Check contours

```{r}
panel(
  out,
  dim = c(5, 6),
  names = TRUE,
  borders = 1
)
```

## True EFD normalization後の輪郭の再構築

```{r}
file_paths_true_efd <- list.files(
  "data/coefficients_efd_normalized_triadica_sebifera/",
  full.names = TRUE,
  pattern = "\\.csv$"
)
id_name <- file_path_sans_ext(basename(file_paths_true_efd))

reconst_list <- lapply(file_paths_true_efd, function(fp) {
  cat("File:", fp, "\n")
  df <- read.csv(fp)
  reconstructed_shape <- efourier_shape(
    df$an,
    df$bn,
    df$cn,
    df$dn,
    nb.pts = 120,
    plot = TRUE
  )
  # start point
  points(
    reconstructed_shape[1, 1],
    reconstructed_shape[1, 2],
    col = 2,
    pch = 19,
    cex = 2
  )
  return(reconstructed_shape)
})
out_reconst_oriented <- Out(reconst_list) # convert to Momocs Out object
names(out_reconst_oriented) <- id_name

# check reconstructed contours
panel(
  out_reconst_oriented,
  dim = c(5, 6),
  names = TRUE,
  borders = 1
)
```

## 普通の True EFD normalization を行った場合

取得した輪郭から、通常の True EFD normalization を行い、輪郭を再構築して確認します。
長軸を x 軸に揃えるように回転させるため、サンプル間で向きがそろわない可能性があります。

```{r}
nb_h <- 35 # Number of harmonics
ef_true_norm <- efourier_true_norm(
  out,
  nb_h = nb_h,
  x_sy = TRUE,
  y_sy = TRUE,
  skip_rotation = FALSE
) # EFD with normalization
coe <- ef_true_norm$coe # coefficients

coef_list <- lapply(c("A", "B", "C", "D"), function(prefix) {
  coe[, paste0(prefix, 1:nb_h)]
})
names(coef_list) <- c("A", "B", "C", "D")

reconst_list <- lapply(seq_len(dim(coef_list$A)[1]), function(row) {
  cat("ID:", dimnames(coef_list$A)[[1]][row], "\n")
  an <- coef_list$A[row, ]
  bn <- coef_list$B[row, ]
  cn <- coef_list$C[row, ]
  dn <- coef_list$D[row, ]

  # reconstruct shape
  reconstructed_shape <- efourier_shape(
    an,
    bn,
    cn,
    dn,
    nb.h = nb_h,
    nb.pts = 120,
    plot = TRUE
  )
  # start point
  points(
    reconstructed_shape[1, 1],
    reconstructed_shape[1, 2],
    col = 2,
    pch = 19,
    cex = 2
  )
  return(reconstructed_shape)
})

# convert to Momocs Out object
out_reconst <- Out(reconst_list)
names(out_reconst) <- id_name

# confirmation
panel(
  out_reconst,
  dim = c(5, 6),
  names = TRUE,
  borders = 1
)
```

## 取得した輪郭と、True EFD normalization 後の輪郭の比較

```{r}
#| label: compare_contours_oriented_true_efd_normalized

#oldpar <- par("lwd", "new")
save_dir <- "results"
dir.create(save_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
save_file_name <- "compare_contours_oriented_true_efd_normalized_triadica_sebifera.svg"
save_file_path <- file.path(save_dir, save_file_name)
svg(save_file_path, bg = "transparent")
par(lwd = 2) # make borders thicker
dim <- c(5, 6)
panel(out, dim = dim, borders = adjustcolor(1, alpha.f = 0.9))
par(new = TRUE) # overlay
panel(
  out_reconst_oriented,
  dim = dim,
  borders = adjustcolor(7, alpha.f = 0.9)
)
dev.off()
#par(oldpar) # restore par
```

## 取得した輪郭と、普通の True EFD normalization 後の輪郭の比較

```{r}
#| label: compare_contours_true_efd_normalized

#oldpar <- par("lwd", "new")
save_dir <- "results"
dir.create(save_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
save_file_name <- "compare_contours_true_efd_normalized_triadica_sebifera.svg"
save_file_path <- file.path(save_dir, save_file_name)
svg(save_file_path, bg = "transparent")
par(lwd = 2) # make borders thicker
dim <- c(5, 6)
panel(out, dim = dim, borders = adjustcolor(1, alpha.f = 0.9))
par(new = TRUE) # overlay
panel(
  out_reconst,
  dim = dim,
  borders = adjustcolor(7, alpha.f = 0.9)
)
dev.off()
#par(oldpar) # restore par
```

## 輪郭をランダムに回転させ、 True EFD normalization を適用した場合の確認

```{r}
#| label: rotate_contours

set.seed(123) # for reproducibility
angles <- sample(0:360, length(out$coo), replace = TRUE) # rotation angles in degrees

# rotate contours
out_rotated <- mapply(
  function(mat, ang) rotate_xy_centered(mat, ang),
  out$coo,
  angles,
  SIMPLIFY = FALSE
)
out_rotated <- Out(out_rotated, fac = out$fac)
```

```{r}
nb_h <- 10 # number of harmonics
ef_rotated_true_norm <- efourier_true_norm(
  out_rotated,
  nb_h = nb_h,
  x_sy = TRUE,
  y_sy = TRUE,
  skip_rotation = FALSE
)
coe <- ef_rotated_true_norm$coe # coefficients
nb_h <- sum(grepl("^A", colnames(coe))) # number of harmonics
dimnames(ef_rotated_true_norm$coe)[[2]]
coef_list <- lapply(c("A", "B", "C", "D"), function(prefix) {
  coe[, paste0(prefix, 1:nb_h)]
})
names(coef_list) <- c("A", "B", "C", "D")

reconst_list <- lapply(seq_len(dim(coef_list$A)[1]), function(row) {
  cat("ID:", dimnames(coef_list$A)[[1]][row], "\n")
  an <- coef_list$A[row, ]
  bn <- coef_list$B[row, ]
  cn <- coef_list$C[row, ]
  dn <- coef_list$D[row, ]

  # reconstruct shape
  reconstructed_shape <- efourier_shape(
    an,
    bn,
    cn,
    dn,
    nb.h = nb_h,
    nb.pts = 120,
    plot = FALSE
  )
  return(reconstructed_shape)
})

out_reconstructed <- Out(
  reconst_list,
  fac = data.frame(species = factor(sp_name))
) # MomocsのOutオブジェクトに変換
names(out_reconstructed) <- id_name

dim <- c(5, 6)
save_dir <- "results"
dir.create(save_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
save_file_name <- "contour_rotation_reconstrucsion_triadica_sebifera.svg"
save_file_path <- file.path(save_dir, save_file_name)
svg(
  save_file_path,
  bg = "transparent"
)
par(lwd = 2) # make borders thicker
panel(out_rotated, dim = dim, borders = adjustcolor(1, alpha.f = 0.9))
par(new = TRUE) # overlay
panel(
  out_reconstructed,
  dim = dim,
  borders = adjustcolor(7, alpha.f = 0.9)
)
dev.off()
```
